_readme: User-editable. Three collection types: 'director' (person: exact TMDB person name; full directed filmography is auto-resolved), 'franchise' (tmdbCollectionSearch or explicit tmdbCollectionId), 'custom' (movies: array of {title, year} matched like Excel rows). Order here = display order on the shelf.

collections.title: Alfred Hitchcock
collections.description: The master of suspense — the complete directed filmography, from the silent era to Family Plot.

collections.title: Stanley Kubrick
collections.description: Thirteen films in forty-six years. Perfectionism as a body of work.

collections.title: Andrei Tarkovsky
collections.description: Sculpting in time — seven features that treat cinema as prayer.

collections.title: Quentin Tarantino
collections.description: Dialogue, needle drops, and a career-long conversation with film history.

collections.title: David Fincher
collections.description: Precision-machined thrillers and the dark side of institutions.

collections.title: Transformers
collections.description: Every Transformers movie — the complete franchise, for better or worse.
